metadata.description: SEO rescue, outreach and beginner-audit skills for Claude Code. Three focused skills: a free-tools beginner SEO audit (no paid APIs needed), a 6–12 month Google Core Update recovery playbook, and a polished decision-maker-friendly PDF outreach report (Sistrix + DataForSEO + PSI pipeline).

plugins.name: seo-rescue
plugins.description: Three complementary SEO skills built from real 2026 recovery cases — a free-tools beginner audit (Google Search Console + PageSpeed + Lighthouse + manual checks), a post-Core-Update Authority-First recovery framework, and a 10-chapter outreach-ready PDF report generator for non-technical site owners. Complements existing audit-focused skills like claude-seo with a rescue-and-communication angle. Includes paid (Sistrix/DataForSEO) and free-tier workflows.
